acceptance.assertion: Routing emits a deterministic recommendation identity and workspace creation independently replays score, route and external candidates from normalized input facts before accepting route evidence.
acceptance.verifier: PR #178 tests and live repeated-route probe

acceptance.assertion: Collection and close publish hash-addressed append-only outcome receipts with first-pass and final role results, retries, elapsed time, event-log-bound known mutating calls and frozen result identity.

Successful and already-succeeded legacy states are not failures; missing declared tools or modules remain diagnostic, and legacy reports without an integrity-valid event log cannot authorize optimizer proposals.
Optimizer proposals require the same actionable failure class in at least two explicitly named independent workspaces.
acceptance.verifier: regression suite and live empty-proposal proof

acceptance.assertion: Caller-supplied closeout evidence is bound to workspace ID, current collection result, writer head, diff and current close receipt; stale evidence after result drift is rejected.
acceptance.verifier: PR #178 stale-evidence regression and live rejection probe

acceptance.assertion: The reviewed implementation is merged, deployed at the exact merge commit, runtime health and tool contract are green, and live routing, observer, optimizer and stale-evidence probes pass.
acceptance.verifier: GitHub PR #178, deployment release and live runtime probes

acceptance.assertion: A real post-deploy Agent Workspace pilot completes writer, tests, independent review and successful close on first pass with route evidence and immutable receipts, and is compared to an explicit direct baseline without general productivity claims.

goal: Bind nontrivial Agent Workspace adoption to a replayable route decision, immutable outcome receipts, conservative legacy observation, independent repeated-failure evidence and explicit closeout truth, then verify the corrected runtime with a bounded post-deploy pilot.

does_not_establish: independent truth from caller-supplied closeout evidence

postdeploy_pilot.assessment: The workspace added substantial measured overhead in this bounded pilot while providing route evidence, writer isolation, read-only tests, independent review, append-only receipts and lease release. One pilot establishes neither a general productivity advantage nor a general disadvantage.

metadata.registration_reason: The task was tracked in Bureau live state during implementation but had no canonical registry file; this record reconciles the completed work to immutable evidence.

title: Harden Agent Workspace outcomes and enforce evidence-bound adoption
